Race-Halfling-Nomadic — Female Nomadic Halfling Fighter
Strength: 10 (0) Dexterity: 17 (3) Constitution: 14 (2) Intelligence: 12 (1) Wisdom: 14 (2) Charisma: 14 (2)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: None Alignment: Neutral Evil
Experience: 184/300 Level: 1 Size: Small Speed: 25 Carry/Lift: 150/300
Ability Notes:
Halfling Ability Adjustment: +2 Dexterity
Nomadic Halfling Ability Adjustment: +1 Wisdom
Halfling Nimbleness: Can move through a space occupied by a larger creature
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: 2
Feat Count: General: 0 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style)
Nomadic Halfling Features: Animal Bond; Halfling Ability Adjustment; Halfling Magic; Halfling Nimbleness; Halfling Skills; Lucky (Halfling); Nomadic Halfling Ability Adjustment; Nomadic Halfling Skills Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Heavy; Shield); Fighting Style (Dueling); Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics/Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Lucky (Halfling): Can reroll 1s on attacks, ability checks, and saves
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Perception
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) 3 Insight: (wis) 2 Performance: (cha) 2
Animal Handling: (wis) 2 Intimidation: (cha) 2 Persuasion: (cha) 2
Arcana: (int) 1 Investigation: (int) 1 Religion: (int) 1
Athletics: (str) 2 Medicine: (wis) 2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) 3
Deception: (cha) 2 Nature: (int) 1 Stealth: (dex) 3
History: (int) 3 Perception: (wis) 4 Survival: (wis) 2
Languages: Erenlander; Halfling; Orcish
Skill Notes:
Halfling Skills: Language (Halfling; Erenlander; Choose 1 from Trader's Tongue, Orcish)
Animal Bond: Has advantage to control, persuade, or communicate with animals
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Nomadic Halfling Skills: Can read and write Halfling
Combat
Hit Points: 8 Initiative: 3 Armor Class: 18 Attacks Per Round: 1
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Maul; Simple Weapons
Armor: Chain Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Javelin (+2 1d6 R30/120); Morningstar (+2 1d8); Shortsword (+5 1d6+3); Unarmed (+2 1)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Fighting Style (Dueling): +2 damage with a single, one-handed melee weapon
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points once per short rest
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: 2; Constitution: 4; Dexterity: 3; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 2; Wisdom: 2
Magic
Attack: Halfling: 4 Spell DC: Halfling: 12
Spells:
Mending (Halfling0 [Halfling Magic] Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1 ft
Prestidigitation (Halfling0 [Halfling Magic] Tran): R10' Creates minor magic effects for 1 hr
Magic Notes: Halfling Magic: Knows the Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips
